title: Lenskit GitHub-Actions-Vertrag auf wartbare Major-Pins umstellen
goal: PR #1004 aktualisiert mehrere SHA-gepinnte GitHub Actions. Lenskit-CI scheitert, weil Vertragstests einen einzelnen alten Checkout-SHA fest verdrahten und Versionskommentare nur als '# vN' statt Dependabots '# vN.N.N' erkennen. Enger Task: Tests auf explizite erlaubte Major-Versionen plus vollständige SHA-Pins umstellen, Browser-Gate semantisch statt hashfest prüfen, PR taskbinden, vollständig validieren und ohne Providerlauf abschließen.

acceptance.assertion: Every recognized JavaScript action remains pinned to a full 40-character commit SHA, while reviewable version comments accept an exact major or semantic version belonging to the explicitly allowed major.
The browser workflow contract verifies the allowed checkout major and full SHA pin without hard-coding one obsolete checkout commit.
The focused workflow-contract tests and the complete Lenskit validation suite pass on the exact published PR head.
The Lenskit maintenance PR is bound only to RBV1-T021 and is merged only after a fresh diff-bound review and green GitHub CI.
The result does not claim arbitrary future action-major compatibility, supply-chain safety beyond reviewed SHA pins, or provider execution.

metadata.renumber_reason: RBV1-T021 was concurrently merged by Bureau PR #563 before this registration PR was created.
